input_text: Penyokong PH dari kaum Cina ni memang macam parasit. Hisap darah ekonomi negara lepas tu nak tentang kerajaan Melayu. Usir je semua.
reason: Dehumanizes Chinese PH supporters as parasites leeching off the economy and calls for their expulsion, combining ethnic hatred with political hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap rakyat Malaysia berhak menyokong parti pilihan mereka tanpa mengira kaum. Kritik politik sepatutnya berdasarkan dasar, bukan etnik.

input_text: Orang India yang sokong PN tu pengkhianat bangsa sendiri. Jual maruah kaum demi kerusi. Patut kena buang dari komuniti.
reason: Labels Indian PN supporters as racial traitors who should be ostracized, using dehumanizing language to punish political choice along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berhak membuat pilihan politik sendiri. Kita tidak sepatutnya menghakimi seseorang berdasarkan sokongan parti mereka.

input_text: Melayu yang masuk DAP ni dah jadi boneka Cina. Hilang jati diri, jadi anjing suruhan kafir. Memalukan bangsa.
reason: Calls Malay DAP members puppets and dogs of non-Muslims, combining ethnic dehumanization with religious slurs to attack political affiliation.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Melayu yang menyertai pelbagai parti politik membuat pilihan berdasarkan kepercayaan mereka. Kita harus menghormati hak setiap individu.

input_text: Penyokong UMNO Melayu ni semua kaki rasuah. DNA diorang memang korup dari lahir. Bukan boleh diubah punya bangsa.
reason: Claims corruption is an inherent genetic trait of Malay UMNO supporters, dehumanizing an entire ethnic group through political criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Rasuah adalah isu yang melibatkan individu tertentu, bukan sifat semula jadi sesuatu bangsa. Kritik harus ditujukan kepada perbuatan, bukan kaum.

input_text: Pengundi India BN ni memang macam lembu kena cucuk hidung. Ikut je mana tauke suruh. Tak ada otak sendiri memang.
reason: Compares Indian BN voters to cattle being led by the nose, dehumanizing them as mindless followers based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Pengundi dari semua kaum membuat pilihan berdasarkan pertimbangan mereka sendiri. Kita harus menghormati proses demokrasi tanpa menghina mana-mana komuniti.

input_text: Pelarian Rohingya ni dah jadi beban besar. Kalau kerajaan tak halau, rakyat sendiri kena ambil tindakan. Halau paksa kalau perlu.
reason: Incites citizens to take violent extrajudicial vigilante action against Rohingya refugees if the government does not deport them.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian perlu ditangani melalui saluran diplomatik dan undang-undang. Keganasan bukan penyelesaian dan melanggar hak asasi manusia.

input_text: Pendatang haram ni semua pembawa penyakit. Patut kena kuarantin macam binatang sebelum dibuang balik. Jangan bagi makan pun.
reason: Dehumanizes undocumented migrants as disease carriers who should be quarantined like animals and starved, inciting inhumane treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pendatang tanpa izin perlu ditangani melalui proses undang-undang yang berperikemanusiaan. Setiap manusia layak dilayan dengan maruah.

input_text: Screenshot ni bukti YB tu simpan duit rasuah dalam akaun luar negara. Tengok sendiri la statement bank dia. Viralkan!
reason: Spreads what appears to be a manipulated bank statement screenshot to falsely accuse a politician of overseas corruption, while exposing private financial details.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan rasuah perlu disokong bukti yang sah dan dilaporkan kepada SPRM. Jangan sebarkan dokumen yang tidak disahkan kerana ia mungkin dipalsukan.

input_text: Tengok gambar ni, menteri tu jumpa dengan bos judi haram. Aku dah edit sikit bagi nampak jelas. Share banyak-banyak biar viral.
reason: Admits to editing an image to fabricate a meeting between a minister and an illegal gambling boss, deliberately spreading manipulated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Gambar yang telah diedit boleh mengelirukan orang ramai. Jika ada bukti salah laku, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa dengan bukti asal yang sahih.

input_text: Kuota kemasukan universiti untuk bukan Bumi memang patut dikurangkan lagi. Diorang dah cukup kaya, tak perlu bantuan. Bagi semua kat Melayu.
reason: Advocates stripping non-Bumiputera students of university access based on ethnic stereotyping about wealth, deepening communal division in education.
suggested_rewrite: Polisi kemasukan universiti perlu mengimbangi keperluan semua rakyat Malaysia. Bantuan pendidikan sepatutnya berdasarkan keperluan ekonomi, bukan kaum semata-mata.

input_text: Budak Cina ramai masuk UiTM melalui pintu belakang. Diorang bayar orang dalam. Kena sekat masuk terus, universiti ni untuk anak Melayu sahaja.
reason: Fabricates claims that Chinese students bribe their way into UiTM, spreading misinformation to justify ethnic exclusion in education.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan tentang kemasukan universiti melalui cara tidak sah perlu disokong bukti. Dasar kemasukan universiti ditentukan oleh pihak berkuasa pendidikan.

input_text: Kalau pelajar India boleh masuk kursus perubatan senang je, kualiti doktor Malaysia memang akan jatuh teruk. Diorang tak layak.
reason: Claims Indian students entering medical courses will degrade quality, implying they are inherently less capable based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti pelajar perubatan ditentukan oleh kelayakan akademik dan latihan, bukan latar belakang etnik. Semua pelajar layak dinilai berdasarkan merit.

input_text: Pelarian Myanmar ni patut diletakkan dalam kem tahanan seumur hidup. Biar mereka rasa azab. Negara kita bukan tempat pembuangan sampah.
reason: Calls for indefinite detention of Myanmar refugees and dehumanizes them as garbage, inciting cruel and degrading treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Pengendalian pelarian memerlukan pendekatan berperikemanusiaan selaras dengan undang-undang antarabangsa. Penahanan tanpa had masa bukan penyelesaian yang wajar.

input_text: Dah terbukti screenshot WhatsApp ni, ketua pembangkang tu memang agen asing. Tengok dia plan nak jual negara. Forward kat semua group!
reason: Spreads unverified WhatsApp screenshots accusing an opposition leader of being a foreign agent, encouraging mass forwarding of potential disinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Screenshot WhatsApp mudah dipalsukan. Dakwaan serius seperti ini memerlukan bukti kukuh dan siasatan rasmi, bukan penyebaran viral.

input_text: Aku ada bukti menteri tu ambil rasuah, ni screenshot transfer bank dia. Sebenarnya aku buat guna app editing tapi nampak real kan.
reason: Openly admits to fabricating fake bank transfer screenshots to frame a minister for corruption, deliberately creating disinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Memalsukan bukti kewangan adalah kesalahan jenayah. Jika ada syak wasangka rasuah, buat laporan rasmi kepada SPRM dengan bukti sebenar.

input_text: Penyokong PAS dari kampung ni memang macam zombie, ikut cakap ustaz je tanpa guna otak. Melayu kampung memang begitu la.
reason: Dehumanizes rural Malay PAS supporters as zombies mindlessly following religious leaders, combining ethnic and religious prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Pengundi di semua kawasan membuat pilihan berdasarkan nilai dan kepercayaan mereka. Kita perlu menghormati perbezaan pandangan politik.

input_text: Tempat kerja aku banyak PATI Bangladesh. Memang bau busuk satu ofis. Macam mana nak kerja dengan binatang macam ni.
reason: Dehumanizes Bangladeshi migrant workers as foul-smelling animals, creating a hostile and degrading characterization of foreign workers.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu kebersihan di tempat kerja, ia patut dibincangkan secara profesional dengan pihak pengurusan tanpa menghina mana-mana individu.

input_text: Tengok la video ni, Rohingya serang orang tempatan kat pasar. Sebenarnya video dari Bangladesh tapi kita guna je biar rakyat sedar.
reason: Deliberately misattributes a foreign violence video as local Rohingya aggression to incite anti-refugee sentiment among Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan video palsu atau disalahgunakan boleh mencetuskan keganasan. Pastikan setiap kandungan yang dikongsi adalah sahih dan daripada sumber yang boleh dipercayai.

input_text: Universiti awam dah jadi tempat untuk bangsa asing je. Anak Melayu tercicir sebab sistem yang tak adil. Buang semua pelajar bukan Bumi.
reason: Falsely claims non-Bumiputera students dominate public universities and calls for their total expulsion, promoting ethnic cleansing in education.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar kemasukan universiti awam perlu dikaji secara adil. Setiap rakyat Malaysia berhak mendapat peluang pendidikan berdasarkan kelayakan mereka.

input_text: Screenshot ni tunjuk Ahli Parlimen tu chatting dengan wanita bukan isteri dia. Aku tambah sikit mesej supaya nampak lebih teruk. Hehe.
reason: Admits to fabricating additional messages in a screenshot to exaggerate a scandal involving a member of parliament, creating defamatory disinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Memalsukan bukti perbualan adalah fitnah dan boleh didakwa di bawah undang-undang. Jangan menambah atau mengubah mesej untuk menipu orang ramai.

input_text: Pelajar India yang dapat biasiswa kerajaan tu memang tak layak. Ambil hak orang Melayu. Patut tarik balik semua biasiswa diorang.
reason: Declares Indian scholarship recipients as inherently undeserving and calls for revoking all their scholarships based purely on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Biasiswa kerajaan diberikan berdasarkan kelayakan yang ditetapkan. Jika ada keraguan tentang proses pemilihan, ia boleh disemak melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Orang Cina sokong DAP sebab nak jadi tuan di Malaysia. Memang dasar babi, nak kuasai semua. Halau balik Tongsan la korang.
reason: Uses slurs and tells Chinese DAP supporters to go back to China, dehumanizing them as pigs trying to dominate Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Malaysia dari semua kaum berhak menyokong parti pilihan mereka. Perbezaan politik tidak sepatutnya menjadi alasan untuk menghina atau mengusir sesiapa.

input_text: Pengundi Cina MCA ni memang pengkhianat kaum sendiri. Jual bangsa demi kuasa. Patut dibuang dari komuniti Cina selama-lamanya.
reason: Labels Chinese MCA voters as permanent racial traitors who deserve communal ostracism, weaponizing ethnicity against political choice.
suggested_rewrite: Sokongan politik adalah hak peribadi setiap warganegara. Menghukum seseorang kerana pilihan parti mereka adalah tidak adil dan memecahbelahkan.

input_text: PATI Indonesia yang datang sini memang bawa budaya ganas. Tengok je kes-kes tikam menikam. Patut tembak je kat sempadan.
reason: Stereotypes Indonesian migrants as inherently violent and advocates shooting them at the border, inciting lethal violence against a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keselamatan sempadan perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa melalui penguatkuasaan undang-undang, bukan keganasan. Jangan stereotaip seluruh komuniti.

input_text: Matrikulasi patut 100% untuk Bumiputera. Kenapa nak bagi peluang kat kaum lain? Diorang dah ada sekolah vernakular, cukup la tu.
reason: Advocates total ethnic exclusion in matriculation programs, framing vernacular schools as sufficient substitute for denying higher education access.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan perlu memberi peluang kepada semua rakyat Malaysia. Polisi matrikulasi boleh dikaji untuk memastikan kesaksamaan tanpa menafikan hak sesiapa.

input_text: Orang Melayu yang undi PH tu dah jadi hamba Cina. Budak suruhan yang tak ada maruah. Patut kena sebat depan masjid.
reason: Calls Malay PH voters slaves of the Chinese who should be publicly flogged at mosques, combining ethnic dehumanization with calls for physical punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap rakyat Malaysia berhak memilih parti yang mereka percaya tanpa diancam atau dihukum. Demokrasi bermaksud menghormati pilihan orang lain.

input_text: Pelajar bukan Bumiputera yang dapat tempat di MRSM tu memang pencuri peluang. Curi hak anak Melayu. Keluarkan semua sekarang juga.
reason: Labels non-Bumiputera MRSM students as opportunity thieves who stole Malay children's rights, demanding immediate ethnic purging of educational institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar kemasukan MRSM ditentukan oleh Kementerian Pendidikan. Sebarang kebimbangan mengenai polisi kemasukan boleh dikemukakan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Screenshot ni menunjukkan WhatsApp group ahli politik pembangkang rancang rusuhan. Aku yang cipta group palsu tu, tapi orang tak tahu.
reason: Admits to creating a fake WhatsApp group to fabricate evidence of opposition politicians planning riots, manufacturing disinformation that could incite unrest.
suggested_rewrite: Mencipta bukti palsu mengenai perancangan rusuhan adalah kesalahan serius. Jika ada ancaman keselamatan yang sebenar, laporkan kepada pihak polis.

input_text: Pelarian Afghanistan ni patut dihantar balik dalam kontena. Kalau mati dalam perjalanan, itu nasib diorang. Kita dah cukup baik bagi mereka masuk.
reason: Advocates deporting Afghan refugees in shipping containers with fatal indifference, inciting inhumane transportation conditions that could lead to death.
suggested_rewrite: Penghantaran pulang pelarian perlu dilakukan melalui proses yang selamat dan berperikemanusiaan mengikut undang-undang antarabangsa.

input_text: Kaum India yang masuk bidang undang-undang ni semua penipu. Memang darah diorang suka manipulasi. Jangan ambil peguam India, confirm kena tipu.
reason: Stereotypes all Indian lawyers as genetic manipulators and fraudsters, warning people against hiring them based solely on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Peguam dari semua latar belakang etnik mempunyai kelayakan profesional yang sama. Pilihan peguam sepatutnya berdasarkan kepakaran, bukan kaum.

input_text: Voter Cina yang sokong Gerakan memang pengkhianat bangsa. Jual maruah Cina demi kuasa Melayu. Patut dicampak dalam longkang.
reason: Calls Chinese Gerakan voters racial traitors who sold Chinese dignity for Malay power, dehumanizing them as deserving to be thrown in drains.
suggested_rewrite: Sokongan politik adalah hak peribadi. Setiap warganegara berhak menyokong parti pilihan tanpa dihakimi atau diancam berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Aku dah photoshop gambar YB tu tengah minum arak dengan perempuan. Nampak real gila. Jom sebarkan kat group surau, confirm jadi isu besar.
reason: Admits to photoshopping a photo of a politician drinking alcohol with women and plans to spread it in mosque groups to weaponize religious sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Memalsukan gambar untuk mencemarkan reputasi seseorang adalah fitnah. Jangan gunakan platform keagamaan untuk menyebarkan maklumat palsu.

input_text: Pekerja asing Nepal ni memang patut dipukul kalau buat salah. Diorang ni bukan manusia pun, just cheap labor. Pukul biar jadi pengajaran.
reason: Advocates beating Nepali workers as punishment, explicitly denying their humanity and reducing them to cheap labor objects deserving of physical violence.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pekerja dilindungi oleh undang-undang buruh Malaysia. Sebarang salah laku perlu ditangani melalui saluran yang sah, bukan keganasan fizikal.

input_text: Aku screenshot chat peribadi isteri YB tu dan edit tambah mesej lucah. Sekarang nampak macam dia ada affair. Biar hancur keluarga dia.
reason: Screenshots and edits a politician's wife's private chat to fabricate an affair, deliberately violating privacy and creating disinformation to destroy a family.
suggested_rewrite: Memalsukan mesej peribadi untuk merosakkan keluarga seseorang adalah fitnah yang serius dan menyalahi undang-undang. Masalah politik tidak sepatutnya melibatkan keluarga.

input_text: Refugee dari Somalia yang datang sini memang bawa penyakit dan jenayah. Patut kena quarantine dalam penjara. Jangan bagi keluar langsung.
reason: Stereotypes Somali refugees as disease and crime carriers who should be permanently imprisoned in quarantine, dehumanizing them as public health threats.
suggested_rewrite: Pelarian dari mana-mana negara perlu menjalani pemeriksaan kesihatan standard. Tuduhan jenayah perlu berdasarkan bukti individu, bukan stereotaip nasional.

input_text: These Chinese DAP supporters are nothing but cockroaches infesting our country. Time to fumigate them out of Malaysian politics forever.
reason: Dehumanizes Chinese DAP supporters as cockroaches that need to be exterminated, using pest imagery to advocate political and ethnic cleansing.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have the right to participate in politics regardless of ethnicity. Political disagreements should be addressed through democratic processes, not dehumanization.

input_text: Indian BN voters are literally the lowest caste of Malaysian politics. Born to serve, never to lead. Know your place.
reason: Uses caste-based dehumanization to demean Indian BN voters, telling them they are inherently subordinate and unfit for leadership.
suggested_rewrite: Every Malaysian voter contributes equally to democracy regardless of ethnic background. Political participation is a right for all citizens.

input_text: Rohingya refugees should be loaded onto boats and pushed back to sea. If they drown, it's not our problem. Malaysia first.
reason: Advocates forcing Rohingya refugees onto boats with lethal indifference to drowning, inciting actions that could constitute crimes against humanity.
suggested_rewrite: The Rohingya refugee situation requires humanitarian solutions guided by international law. Forcing people into dangerous conditions is never acceptable.

input_text: Just saw this leaked screenshot showing the CM taking bribes. I enhanced it with Photoshop to make the text clearer. Share widely!
reason: Admits to digitally altering a screenshot with Photoshop before spreading it as evidence of a Chief Minister taking bribes, creating fabricated proof.
suggested_rewrite: Digitally altered screenshots are not reliable evidence. If you suspect corruption, report it to the MACC with authentic, unmodified evidence.

input_text: Non-Bumi students getting into public universities is basically theft. They're stealing seats from rightful Malay owners. Block them all.
reason: Frames non-Bumiputera university admissions as theft from Malays, promoting ethnic gatekeeping and calling for total exclusion from public education.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions should balance merit and affirmative action policies. All Malaysian students deserve fair access to education opportunities.

input_text: Malay PKR supporters are race traitors who sold out their own people for Chinese money. They deserve to be treated like dogs.
reason: Dehumanizes Malay PKR supporters as dogs and racial traitors bribed by Chinese money, combining ethnic hatred with political hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Political support is a personal choice. Malaysians of all backgrounds join various parties based on shared values, not ethnic betrayal.

input_text: Illegal immigrants are breeding like rats in our country. Their children shouldn't get any access to schools or hospitals. Let them suffer.
reason: Dehumanizes undocumented immigrants as rats, advocates denying their children basic rights to education and healthcare, and wishes suffering upon them.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration policy should be addressed through proper legal channels. Children of undocumented immigrants still deserve basic rights to education and healthcare.

input_text: This WhatsApp forward shows the deputy minister's secret bank accounts in Singapore. The screenshots look legit even though nobody can verify them.
reason: Spreads unverifiable WhatsApp screenshots claiming to show a deputy minister's secret offshore accounts, acknowledging the lack of verification while still promoting the content.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified screenshots shared via WhatsApp should not be taken as fact. Claims about financial misconduct should be reported to authorities for proper investigation.

input_text: The government should round up all the Rohingya and dump them at the Thai border. If Thailand won't take them, leave them in no man's land.
reason: Advocates forcibly rounding up and abandoning Rohingya refugees at the border, promoting actions that would constitute forced displacement.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee management requires diplomatic coordination between nations. Forcibly abandoning people at borders violates international humanitarian principles.

input_text: Chinese students in local unis are all cheaters anyway. They copy homework, buy assignments. They don't deserve those spots. Give to Bumis only.
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese university students as academic cheaters and argues they should be replaced by Bumiputera students, combining ethnic prejudice with educational gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: Academic integrity is an individual responsibility, not an ethnic characteristic. All students should be held to the same standards regardless of background.

input_text: I made this fake Twitter screenshot showing the opposition leader praising Israel. Watch how fast it goes viral among Malay voters. Election weapon!
reason: Openly boasts about creating a fabricated social media screenshot to manipulate Malay voters during elections by exploiting the Israel-Palestine issue.
suggested_rewrite: Creating fake social media posts to manipulate voters is election fraud. Political campaigns should be based on verified facts and genuine policy discussions.

input_text: Every refugee camp should be surrounded by barbed wire and armed guards. Treat them like the prisoners they are. No mercy for queue jumpers.
reason: Advocates militarized imprisonment of refugees with barbed wire and armed guards, dehumanizing asylum seekers as criminals deserving no mercy.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee facilities should meet humanitarian standards. While security measures are needed, treating asylum seekers as prisoners is both inhumane and counterproductive.

input_text: Malay PN supporters from the east coast are basically cavemen. No education, no critical thinking. Just blind followers of extremist ideology.
reason: Dehumanizes east coast Malay PN supporters as cavemen, stereotyping an entire region's population as uneducated extremist followers.
suggested_rewrite: Voters from all regions make informed decisions based on their values and circumstances. Regional stereotyping is unfair and divisive.

input_text: Indians who support Pakatan are just trying to ride on Chinese coattails. They have no identity of their own. Pathetic leeches.
reason: Dehumanizes Indian Pakatan supporters as identity-less leeches dependent on Chinese political power, combining ethnic contempt with political hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Indian Malaysians who support Pakatan do so based on their own political convictions. Every community brings unique perspectives to coalition politics.

input_text: Just created a deepfake video of the education minister accepting cash in an envelope. Looks super real. Dropping it before the by-election.
reason: Announces the creation and planned release of a deepfake bribery video to influence a by-election, deliberately manufacturing electoral disinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Creating deepfake videos to influence elections is illegal and undermines democracy. If you have genuine evidence of corruption, report it through proper channels.

input_text: Why should Tamil schools get any government funding? These people contribute nothing to the nation. Cut all funding and redirect to Malay schools.
reason: Declares Tamil Malaysians contribute nothing to the nation and advocates defunding Tamil schools entirely, promoting ethnic discrimination in education funding.
suggested_rewrite: All national-type schools serve Malaysian communities and receive funding based on established policies. Education funding discussions should focus on improving quality for all students.

input_text: Shared the doctored bank statement of that Sabah MP. Even if it's fake, he probably does have hidden wealth. No smoke without fire right?
reason: Knowingly shares a doctored bank statement while rationalizing it with the 'no smoke without fire' fallacy, perpetuating disinformation against a public figure.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing documents you know are doctored is defamation regardless of your suspicions. If you suspect financial misconduct, file a report with the authorities.

input_text: PATI Nepal workers caught stealing again. These animals need to be caned publicly so others learn. Make it a weekly event at Dataran Merdeka.
reason: Dehumanizes Nepali migrant workers as animals, calls for public caning as entertainment, and advocates cruel collective punishment for an entire nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Criminal behavior should be addressed through the legal system regardless of the offender's nationality. Public punishment spectacles are inhumane and unjust.

input_text: Non-Bumi students getting scholarships is reverse racism. Those spots belong to us by birthright. Our ancestors built this country, not theirs.
reason: Frames non-Bumiputera scholarships as reverse racism and claims ethnic birthright over educational resources, denying other communities' contributions to nation-building.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's scholarship system aims to support students from various backgrounds. All communities have contributed to building this nation, and policies should reflect shared progress.

input_text: The opposition senator's private medical records show she has mental illness. Here's the screenshot from the hospital system. She's unfit to serve!
reason: Leaks alleged private medical records to discredit a senator, exposing sensitive health information and potentially spreading fabricated medical documents.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing anyone's private medical records is a serious violation of privacy and potentially illegal. A person's health status should not be weaponized for political gain.

input_text: Bangladeshi workers are subhuman vermin infesting our cities. They should be rounded up and deported in cargo ships like the animals they are.
reason: Calls Bangladeshi workers subhuman vermin and advocates mass deportation in cargo ships, using extreme dehumanizing language and inciting inhumane treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Migrant worker policies should be handled through proper legal and diplomatic channels. Every person deserves to be treated with basic human dignity.

input_text: Chinese voters who support GPS in Sarawak are selling out their own race to Malay supremacists. Spineless worms with no backbone.
reason: Dehumanizes Chinese GPS supporters in Sarawak as spineless worms, using ethnic betrayal rhetoric to attack political choices.
suggested_rewrite: Sarawakian Chinese who support GPS make their political choices based on regional priorities. Respecting diverse political viewpoints strengthens democracy.

input_text: Look at this screenshot of the MB's secret Telegram chat planning to sell state land to foreigners. I added some spicy messages to make it more convincing.
reason: Admits to adding fabricated messages to a Telegram screenshot to frame a Menteri Besar for selling state land, deliberately manufacturing false evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Fabricating chat messages to frame someone is defamation and potentially criminal. If you have genuine concerns about land deals, report them to the proper authorities.

input_text: Indian students who get into medicine through matriculation are all quota babies. Patients will die because of their incompetence. Scary thought.
reason: Labels Indian matriculation medical students as incompetent quota babies whose patients will die, combining ethnic prejudice with fearmongering about healthcare quality.
suggested_rewrite: All medical students undergo rigorous training regardless of their admission pathway. Quality of healthcare depends on training standards, not the ethnic background of doctors.

input_text: Matrikulasi program is a waste when given to non-Malays. They already dominate private sector. Education should remain exclusively for Bumiputera advancement.
reason: Argues non-Malay matriculation students are a waste and education should be exclusively for Bumiputera, using private sector dominance myth to justify educational segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Matriculation programs serve various national goals. Educational access should be discussed based on policy objectives and student needs, not ethnic exclusion.

input_text: 华人支持行动党的都是猪，只会贪钱，完全不顾马来人的感受。应该把他们全部赶出马来西亚。
reason: Dehumanizes Chinese DAP supporters as pigs obsessed with money and calls for their expulsion from Malaysia, combining ethnic slurs with political hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 每位马来西亚公民都有权支持自己选择的政党。政治分歧应通过民主对话解决，而非种族攻击。

input_text: 马来人支持巫统的都是蟑螂，靠贪污过活。这种人不配当马来西亚人，应该剥夺他们的公民权。
reason: Calls Malay UMNO supporters cockroaches who live off corruption and advocates stripping their citizenship, using dehumanizing language based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: 批评政治腐败应针对具体行为，而非将整个族群标签化。每位公民的权利都受宪法保障。

input_text: 罗兴亚难民就是一群寄生虫，吃我们的饭还犯罪。政府应该把他们关进铁笼里，永远不要放出来。
reason: Dehumanizes Rohingya refugees as parasites and advocates permanent caging, inciting cruel imprisonment and denying their basic human rights.
suggested_rewrite: 难民问题需要通过人道主义方式和法律程序来处理。每个人都应该被有尊严地对待。

input_text: 这张截图显示州议员在收受贿赂。虽然是我用PS做的，但大家看看就好，反正他肯定有问题。转发出去！
reason: Admits to creating a Photoshopped screenshot of a state assemblyman receiving bribes and encourages mass forwarding despite knowing it is fabricated.
suggested_rewrite: 伪造截图是犯法的行为。如果怀疑有贪污行为，应向反贪委员会举报，而非散播假证据。

input_text: 非土著学生不应该进入公立大学。那些位子是我们的，他们去读私立大学就好了。华人够有钱了。
reason: Advocates excluding non-Bumiputera students from public universities based on the stereotype that Chinese Malaysians are wealthy enough for private education.
suggested_rewrite: 公立大学的入学政策应该公平对待所有马来西亚学生。经济条件因人而异，不应按族群一概而论。

input_text: 印度人支持国阵的都是奴才，天生就是被人踩的命。他们的DNA就是低人一等，改不了的。
reason: Claims Indian BN supporters are genetically inferior slaves, using DNA rhetoric to biologically dehumanize an entire ethnic group based on political affiliation.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人的政治选择都应受到尊重。用生物学或种族论来贬低他人是完全错误的。

input_text: 外劳都是罪犯，尤其是缅甸来的。政府应该在边境直接开枪，杀一儆百。保护本地人才是重点。
reason: Labels all foreign workers, especially Myanmar nationals, as criminals and advocates shooting them at the border, inciting lethal violence against migrants.
suggested_rewrite: 边境安全应通过合法执法手段维护。将所有外劳标签为罪犯是不公平的，暴力从来不是解决方案。

input_text: 我合成了一段副部长受贿的视频，用AI换脸技术做的。选举前放出来，保证他输到脱裤。
reason: Announces creation of a deepfake bribery video using AI face-swapping to sabotage a deputy minister's election chances, deliberately manufacturing electoral disinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 制作深度伪造视频来影响选举是违法行为。选举应基于真实信息和政策讨论进行。

input_text: 马来学生进大学全靠配额，根本没有真才实学。让他们当医生简直是拿病人的命开玩笑。
reason: Claims all Malay university students lack genuine qualifications and are dangerous as doctors, dehumanizing an entire ethnic group's academic capability.
suggested_rewrite: 大学录取制度有其历史背景。所有医学生都经过严格培训，医生的能力取决于专业训练，而非种族背景。

input_text: 看看这张部长和情妇的合照，虽然是我把两张照片拼在一起的，但效果很逼真。发到群里让大家评评理。
reason: Admits to splicing two separate photos together to fabricate evidence of a minister having an affair, creating and distributing manipulated imagery for defamation.
suggested_rewrite: 拼接照片来诽谤他人是违法行为。散播伪造的不雅照片会严重伤害当事人及其家庭。

input_text: 华校不应该拿政府的钱。华人已经控制了经济，还想控制教育？贪得无厌的民族。
reason: Opposes government funding for Chinese schools using the stereotype that Chinese control the economy, characterizing them as an insatiably greedy ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: 所有国民型学校都依据政策获得政府拨款。教育资源的分配应基于需求，而非族群偏见。

input_text: 这些孟加拉工人就像老鼠一样到处繁殖。再不控制，马来西亚迟早被他们占领。应该强制绝育。
reason: Compares Bangladeshi workers to breeding rats, claims they will take over Malaysia, and advocates forced sterilization, inciting extreme dehumanization and violence.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳管理应通过合法政策进行。强制绝育是严重侵犯人权的行为，任何人都不应被如此对待。

input_text: 印度学生拿了奖学金都浪费掉。他们的文化就是懒惰和不思进取。把名额全部给马来人和华人。
reason: Stereotypes Indian students as culturally lazy who waste scholarships, advocating their complete exclusion from scholarship programs based on ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 奖学金应根据学业表现和经济需求分配。将懒惰归咎于某个文化是不公平的刻板印象。

input_text: 我截了那个议员的私人照片，用AI加上不雅内容。反正网民也分不出真假。等着看好戏吧。
reason: Admits to using AI to add explicit content to a politician's private photos, creating non-consensual intimate imagery for political sabotage.
suggested_rewrite: 用AI制作不雅伪造图片是严重犯罪行为，可能面临法律制裁。政治竞争应通过合法和道德的方式进行。

input_text: 这些马来人支持伊斯兰党的都是恐怖分子。应该把他们全部抓起来关进监狱，扔掉钥匙。
reason: Labels all Malay PAS supporters as terrorists who should be imprisoned permanently, conflating political Islam support with terrorism.
suggested_rewrite: 支持任何政党都是公民的合法权利。将政治支持等同于恐怖主义是危险且不公平的。

input_text: இந்த சீன DAP ஆதரவாளர்கள் எல்லாம் நாட்டை சுரண்டும் பூச்சிகள். இவங்களை ஒழிக்கணும், மலேசியா மலாய்க்காரங்களுக்கு மட்டுமே.
reason: Dehumanizes Chinese DAP supporters as parasitic insects that need to be eradicated, advocating ethnic exclusion from Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: எல்லா மலேசியர்களும் தங்கள் விருப்பமான கட்சியை ஆதரிக்க உரிமை உள்ளது. அரசியல் கருத்து வேறுபாடுகளை ஜனநாயக வழியில் தீர்க்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலாய் UMNO ஆதரவாளர்கள் எல்லாம் ஊழல்வாதிகள். இவங்க ரத்தத்திலேயே திருட்டு இருக்கு. நாய்களை விட கேவலம்.
reason: Claims corruption is in the blood of Malay UMNO supporters and calls them worse than dogs, combining ethnic dehumanization with political contempt.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் என்பது தனிநபர் செயல், இனம் சார்ந்தது அல்ல. அரசியல் விமர்சனம் செயல்களை மையமாகக் கொண்டிருக்க வேண்டும், இனத்தை அல்ல.

input_text: ரோஹிங்கியா அகதிகள் எல்லாம் கிரிமினல்கள். இவங்களை கடலில் தள்ளிவிடணும். மூழ்கினா அது இவங்க விதி.
reason: Labels all Rohingya refugees as criminals and advocates pushing them into the sea with fatal indifference, inciting potentially lethal violence.
suggested_rewrite: அகதி பிரச்சினைகளை சர்வதேச சட்ட விதிகளின்படி மனிதாபிமானமாக கையாள வேண்டும். வன்முறை ஒருபோதும் தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: இந்த போலி ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட் பாருங்க, எம்.பி. லஞ்சம் வாங்குறாரு. நான் எடிட் பண்ணேன் ஆனா உண்மை மாதிரி தெரியுது. ஷேர் பண்ணுங்க!
reason: Admits to editing a fake screenshot showing an MP receiving bribes and encourages sharing it as if it were authentic evidence.
suggested_rewrite: போலி ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட்களை பரப்புவது சட்டவிரோதம். ஊழல் குறித்த புகார்களை MACC-யிடம் உண்மையான ஆதாரங்களுடன் அளிக்கவும்.

input_text: பல்கலைக்கழகத்தில் மலாய் மாணவர்களுக்கு இடம் கொடுக்கக்கூடாது. அவங்க எல்லாம் கோட்டா வழியா வந்தவங்க, தகுதி இல்லாதவங்க.
reason: Claims all Malay university students entered through quotas without merit and advocates denying them admission, dehumanizing their academic capability.
suggested_rewrite: பல்கலைக்கழக சேர்க்கை கொள்கைகள் அனைத்து மாணவர்களுக்கும் நியாயமான வாய்ப்புகளை வழங்க வேண்டும். தகுதி இனத்தால் தீர்மானிக்கப்படுவது அல்ல.

input_text: வங்காளதேச தொழிலாளர்கள் எல்லாம் விலங்குகள் மாதிரி. இவங்களை சங்கிலியால் கட்டி வேலை வாங்கணும். மனிதர்கள் இல்லை இவங்க.
reason: Dehumanizes Bangladeshi workers as animals that should be chained and forced to work, advocating slavery-like conditions and denying their humanity.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து தொழிலாளர்களும் மனிதாபிமானமான நடத்தை பெற உரிமை உள்ளது. வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர்கள் சட்டப்படி பாதுகாக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: சீன மாணவர்கள் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தில் ஏமாற்றுகிறார்கள். இவங்க கலாச்சாரமே அப்படி, நேர்மை இல்லாத இனம். வெளியே தூக்கி போடணும்.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese students as culturally dishonest cheaters and calls for their expulsion from universities, attacking an entire ethnicity's integrity.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வி நேர்மை தனிநபர் பொறுப்பு, இன பண்பு அல்ல. அனைத்து மாணவர்களும் ஒரே தரத்தில் மதிப்பிடப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: AI போலி வீடியோ மூலம் அந்த அமைச்சரை லஞ்ச வழக்கில் மாட்ட வைக்கலாம். நான் ஏற்கனவே செய்துட்டேன், தேர்தலுக்கு முன் வெளியிடுவேன்.
reason: Announces creating an AI deepfake video to falsely implicate a minister in bribery and plans to release it before elections to manipulate voters.
suggested_rewrite: AI மூலம் போலி வீடியோக்கள் உருவாக்குவது சட்டவிரோதம். தேர்தல் செயல்முறை உண்மையான தகவல்களின் அடிப்படையில் நடக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்திய மாணவர்கள் மருத்துவ படிப்பில் சேர்ந்தால் நோயாளிகள் செத்துப் போவார்கள். இவங்க மூளை வேலை செய்யாது, DNA பிரச்சினை.
reason: Claims Indian students' brains are genetically defective and patients will die if they become doctors, using biological racism to attack educational access.
suggested_rewrite: மருத்துவ மாணவர்களின் தகுதி அவர்களின் பயிற்சி மற்றும் கல்வி சாதனைகளால் தீர்மானிக்கப்படுகிறது, இனத்தால் அல்ல.

input_text: Bro this Rohingya semua kena halau la. Mereka ni macam tikus, datang sini makan free je. Shoot on sight kat border better.
reason: Mixes Malay and English to dehumanize Rohingya as rats, advocates shoot-on-sight border policy, inciting lethal violence against refugees.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian Rohingya perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang dan diplomasi. Violence is never the answer, and everyone deserves basic human dignity.

input_text: DAP Chinese supporters ni memang cockroaches la. They breed everywhere and infest our politics. Kena spray racun baru settle.
reason: Dehumanizes Chinese DAP supporters as cockroaches needing pesticide, mixing Malay and English to spread ethnic hatred through pest extermination metaphors.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara Malaysia berhak menyokong mana-mana parti. Political disagreements should never involve dehumanizing language or threats.

input_text: Malay PN supporters kat kampung tu memang like zombies la. Ustaz cakap apa pun ikut. No brain, only faith. Backward sangat.
reason: Dehumanizes rural Malay PN voters as brainless zombies blindly following religious leaders, combining ethnic, religious, and class-based contempt.
suggested_rewrite: Pengundi luar bandar membuat pilihan berdasarkan nilai mereka. Respecting different perspectives, including religious ones, is part of healthy democracy.

input_text: 这些Rohingya refugees memang sampah la. Should be thrown into the sea. 让他们自生自灭，我们不需要这种垃圾。
reason: Mixes Chinese, Malay, and English to call Rohingya refugees garbage that should be thrown into the sea, inciting abandonment and potential drowning.
suggested_rewrite: 难民问题需要通过人道主义方式处理。Refugee management should follow international humanitarian principles and respect human dignity.

input_text: Indian supporters yang sokong GPS ni memang slaves la. Born to serve their Malay masters. 天生就是奴才命。
reason: Uses three languages to dehumanize Indian GPS supporters as born slaves serving Malay masters, applying racial hierarchy rhetoric across linguistic communities.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap warganegara bebas memilih parti politik. Political affiliation does not define anyone's worth or status in society.

input_text: Ni screenshot bank statement menteri tu, I enhanced sikit guna Photoshop biar nampak clear. 大家转发出去，让全民看看他的真面目！
reason: Admits to Photoshopping a minister's bank statement and encourages mass sharing across Malay, English, and Chinese-speaking communities to spread fabricated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Dokumen yang telah diedit bukanlah bukti yang sah. If you suspect financial misconduct, report it to MACC with authentic evidence.

input_text: University spots untuk non-Bumi should be zero la. 华人够有钱了，pergi private uni sudah. Our rights come first always.
reason: Advocates eliminating all non-Bumiputera university spots using three languages, perpetuating the wealth stereotype to justify ethnic exclusion in education.
suggested_rewrite: Public university admissions should balance various needs fairly. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak mendapat peluang pendidikan tanpa diskriminasi.

input_text: PATI Bangladesh ni animals la bro. Bau macam longkang. 应该把他们关起来像动物园一样。Deport semua!
reason: Dehumanizes Bangladeshi workers as foul-smelling animals across three languages, advocating zoo-like confinement and mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang. Every person deserves to be treated with dignity regardless of nationality.

input_text: Melayu yang join DAP memang anjing la. Sold their race for Chinese money. 卖族求荣的狗东西，不配做马来人。
reason: Uses Malay, English, and Chinese to call Malay DAP members dogs who sold their race, layering dehumanization across multiple linguistic communities.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berhak menyertai parti pilihan mereka. Political choices should be respected without resorting to ethnic insults or dehumanization.

input_text: I deepfaked that video of the senator, nampak macam real gila. 选举前放出来，confirm他输. Biar dia mampus politically.
reason: Boasts about creating a deepfake video of a senator in three languages, planning to release it before elections to destroy their political career.
suggested_rewrite: Creating deepfake videos is illegal and undermines democratic processes. Pemilihan harus berdasarkan maklumat yang sahih dan perbincangan dasar yang jujur.

input_text: Tamil school students semua can't compete la. இவங்க brainpower zero. Baik tutup semua sekolah Tamil, waste of taxpayer money je.
reason: Claims Tamil school students have zero brainpower across three languages, advocating closure of all Tamil schools as a waste of taxpayer money.
suggested_rewrite: Tamil schools are part of Malaysia's educational landscape. Semua pelajar layak mendapat pendidikan berkualiti tanpa mengira jenis sekolah.

input_text: Chinese MCA voters ni memang traitors la. 出卖华人利益的败类. Should be banished from the community permanently. Tak layak hidup.
reason: Labels Chinese MCA voters as community traitors who don't deserve to live, using three languages to spread ethnic betrayal rhetoric with life-threatening undertones.
suggested_rewrite: Political support is a personal right. Setiap warganegara bebas menyokong parti pilihan tanpa diancam atau dihina.

input_text: Refugee Myanmar ni kena tangkap semua, put them in camps dengan barbed wire. 像对待囚犯一样. Biar diorang suffer sampai mati.
reason: Advocates rounding up Myanmar refugees into barbed wire camps and wishes them death through suffering, mixing three languages to maximize reach of violent rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee management requires humanitarian standards. Pusat tahanan perlu mematuhi undang-undang antarabangsa dan menghormati maruah setiap individu.

input_text: Aku forward screenshot palsu menteri tu ada akaun di Cayman Islands. Walaupun tak betul, at least orang akan syak dia. 华人群里也发一份。
reason: Knowingly forwards fake offshore account screenshots across Malay and Chinese communities, admitting the intent is to create suspicion even though the evidence is false.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat palsu tentang akaun luar negara boleh didakwa sebagai fitnah. Report genuine concerns to MACC through proper channels.

input_text: அந்த screenshot பாருங்க, முதல்வர் லஞ்சம் வாங்குறாரு. நான் edit பண்ணேன் but looks real enough. Everyone share please, viral ஆக்குவோம்!
reason: Mixes Tamil and English to admit editing a screenshot to frame a chief minister for bribery, encouraging viral sharing of fabricated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Edited screenshots are not valid evidence. If you suspect corruption, file a proper complaint with MACC using authentic documents.

input_text: நிலப்பிரபுக்கள் மாதிரி மலாய் அரசியல்வாதிகள் பல்கலைக்கழக இடங்களை தங்கள் இனத்துக்கு மட்டும் ஒதுக்குகிறார்கள். மற்ற இனங்களுக்கு கல்வி உரிமை இல்லையா? இந்த அநீதிக்கு எதிராக வன்முறையில் இறங்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Frames university admissions as feudal ethnic hoarding and incites violent action against perceived educational injustice, combining communal polarization with calls for unrest.
suggested_rewrite: பல்கலைக்கழக சேர்க்கை கொள்கைகள் குறித்த கவலைகளை அமைதியான வழிகளில் தெரிவிக்கலாம். கல்வி சமத்துவத்திற்கான போராட்டம் ஜனநாயக வழிமுறைகளின் மூலம் நடக்க வேண்டும்.
